name: freebird-ai
description: Copilot throttled your speed? Get 5 free advanced edits/day, BYOK for unlimited Pro, or fall back to free local Ollama. Reads your codebase, edits files, pushes to GitHub.

enumDescriptions: Freebird Cloud (Gemini Flash) — works instantly, 5 free edits/day, no setup
Local AI via Ollama — unlimited, 100% private, runs on your machine
Anthropic Claude API — BYOK, direct-to-LLM speed (Pro)
DeepSeek API — BYOK, advanced reasoning model (Pro)
Qwen 2.5 API (DashScope) — BYOK, powerful coding model (Pro)
freebird.backend.description: AI backend to use for Freebird

freebird.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for cloud AI backends (Anthropic or OpenAI). Leave blank if using Ollama.

freebird.model.markdownDescription:
Model override. Leave blank for the recommended default per backend:
- Ollama: `qwen2.5-coder`
- Anthropic: `claude-haiku-4-5`
- OpenAI: `gpt-4o-mini`
- DeepSeek: `deepseek-reasoner`
- Qwen: `qwen2.5-coder-32b-instruct`

Tip: for heavier multi-file agent tasks (Pro), try `claude-sonnet-4-6` — it follows multi-step instructions more reliably than Haiku, at a higher API cost.

freebird.ollamaUrl.description: Ollama server URL (only needed if Ollama runs on a non-default port)

freebird.licenseKey.markdownDescription: Freebird Pro license key (format: `FB-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX`). Get one at [freebird.tenlabs.io/upgrade](https://freebird.tenlabs.io/upgrade).

freebird.tabCompletion.enabled.description: Show inline AI code completions (ghost text) as you type.

freebird.tabCompletion.delay.description: Milliseconds to wait after typing stops before requesting a completion.

freebird.telemetry.enabled.markdownDescription: Allow Freebird to collect anonymous usage statistics (feature usage counts, no code or personal data). Helps us improve the extension.
